Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user gave a sample model and we need to add constraints to mitigate bias

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The model already has existence of StartApplication and FinalDecision init StartApplication coexistence StartApplication and FinalDecision response StartApplication to RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo to FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There is no mention of sensitive attributes To mitigate bias we can introduce new activities like CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I will add activities CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says for example add constraints that enforce that any decision activities cannot immediately follow sensitive attribute events and require ManualReview so these are reasonable fairness activities to introduce

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can add coexistence between CheckSensitiveAttributes and ManualReview ensuring that any trace with a sensitive attribute check must have a manual review

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can add response so that CheckSensitiveAttributes requires BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can add precedence so that if BiasMitigationCheck occurs it must be preceded by CheckSensitiveAttributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can add nonsuccession so CheckSensitiveAttributes cannot be directly followed by FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: These additions do not contradict the existing constraints and allow a valid trace such as StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview FinalDecision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: To be thorough we could add that every FinalDecision must coexist with ManualReview forcing manual review for all decisions That is a strong fairness constraint

Name: Validation - PE
